description_long: This is a small, rustic bed frame constructed primarily from wood, featuring a weathered blue and brown finish that gives it an aged, industrial look. The frame has a slatted base for mattress support, with both headboard and footboard present, each composed of thick, rectangular panels. The side rails are solid and rise slightly above the slatted base, with cut-out sections for easier access. The wood appears to be roughly finished, with visible grain and patches of discoloration, suggesting exposure to the elements or heavy use. The overall design is compact and sturdy, suitable for use in urban outdoor or semi-sheltered environments such as parks, sidewalks, or garages. There is no mattress or bedding present, leaving the slatted wooden base exposed.
description: A compact, weathered wooden bed frame with slatted base, headboard, and footboard, finished in distressed blue and brown tones. The frame is sturdy and rustic, with no mattress or bedding present.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slatted base, headboard, and side rails with cut-out sections.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid headboard and the thickness of the frame panels.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the footboard and slatted base from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite end, again emphasizing the solid footboard and frame construction.
